productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Stripes White Shirt
description: Composition Blue and white stripe shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, a spread collar, a buttoned placket, two patch pockets on the chest with buttoned closures, embroidered branding above the hem and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash at 30 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach, wring, dry clean or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Mild iron Do not iron on print/embellishment/embroidery Top notch style and comfort, this shirt from united colors of benetton is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. The design and attention to detail is sure to earn you fashion accolades, while the fabric will keep you fresh all day. Team this with slim jeans and casual shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
